name: MSExchangeOnline_GetInboxRules
author: Fabien Bloume ,StrangeBee
description: List a mailbox's inbox rules via Microsoft Graph and flag rules commonly abused after a mailbox compromise/BEC: external auto-forwarding, silent delete/move rules, keyword filters on security or financial terms, hiding folders (RSS Feeds...), obfuscated rule names.

configurationItems.name: client_id
configurationItems.description: Client ID/Application ID of Microsoft Entra ID Registered App (requires MailboxSettings.Read and User.Read.All application permissions)

configurationItems.name: client_secret
configurationItems.description: Secret for Microsoft Entra ID Registered Application

configurationItems.name: extended_search
configurationItems.description: Search by additional fields (onPremisesSamAccountName, employeeId) in addition to UPN and mail
